animation: veo3_1_lite via HF hybrid (16:9); cross falls back to direct-Kling (NSFW)
style_base: Baroque oil painting, dramatic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio/Rembrandt lighting, deep shadow and warm golden light, reverent sacred art, muted earth tones, fine brushwork, no text, no modern elements, 16:9 cinematic wide
rule: every quote's visual matches its soundstage cue; the cut CLOSES on Christ (S22 hero). Cross/crucifixion scenes are ROBED with pierced hands shown (veo NSFW workaround).

scenes.title: The wilderness, the prophet
scenes.subject_block: a vast bleak Judean wilderness at dusk, wind-blown dust, one small lone prophet figure standing far off against dry hills, immense empty sky

scenes.title: The scroll, the question
scenes.subject_block: close on an ancient hand and an unrolled scroll by candlelight, ink and parchment, a question hanging in the dark

scenes.title: Behold my servant (glory)
scenes.subject_block: a radiant exalted figure robed in light high above, luminous, awaited as a king, golden glory breaking the dark

scenes.title: The picture breaks (the marred face)
scenes.subject_block: the marred beaten face of the suffering Servant, a man in his early thirties with dark damp hair and a short beard (the same man as the risen Christ, but bruised), his face swollen and bruised, brow furrowed, eyes downcast in deep sorrow, no beauty that we should desire him, heavy shadow with a single cold shaft of light across his wounded face, NO candle, NO elderly man, NO hood

scenes.title: Despised and rejected
scenes.subject_block: a lone suffering figure turned away from by a distant crowd of robed people who look away, isolation, cold grey light

scenes.title: Wounded for our transgressions (the cross beat)
scenes.subject_block: a robed crucified Servant seen with reverence, pierced hands shown, head bowed, dark sky behind, sacred and restrained, NOT graphic
scenes.camera: slow push-in to the pierced hand

scenes.title: The chastisement of our peace
scenes.subject_block: the Servant bowed under a great weight in the foreground while behind him freed figures stand upright in soft light, substitution made visible

scenes.title: All we like sheep have gone astray
scenes.subject_block: scattered sheep wandering apart across a darkening hillside, each going its own way, one shepherd-figure bearing them, dusk
scenes.camera: slow pan across the scattered flock

scenes.title: A lamb to the slaughter
scenes.subject_block: a single white lamb led gently on a rope toward an altar, calm and unresisting, soft sorrowful light, sheep before shearers behind

scenes.title: He opened not his mouth
scenes.subject_block: the silent Servant standing bound before shadowed accusers, dignified, calm, no defence, chiaroscuro

scenes.title: The nation, the servant Israel
scenes.subject_block: a long column of weary exiled people walking under a grey sky, a suffering nation, banners lowered, a corporate body
scenes.camera: slow lateral track of the column

scenes.title: A rich man's tomb, the sinless one
scenes.subject_block: a single hewn-rock tomb at dusk among rich men's graves, sealed and still, one pure light upon it, set apart
scenes.camera: slow approach to the tomb mouth

scenes.title: The Ethiopian in his chariot
scenes.subject_block: an Ethiopian court official in rich robes riding a wooden chariot on a dry desert road, a scroll open on his lap, horses, open sky

scenes.title: Philip comes alongside
scenes.subject_block: a traveler (Philip) walking up to the halted chariot on the dusty road, the two figures meeting, warm low sun

scenes.title: Preached unto him Jesus
scenes.subject_block: Philip pointing the official to a luminous figure of Christ rising in the light over the open scroll, revelation breaking
scenes.camera: slow tilt up into the light

scenes.title: It pleased the LORD (the cross, dark sky)
scenes.subject_block: the robed crucified Servant on a hill under a black thunderous sky, a single shaft of heaven's light upon him, he pours out his soul, reverent and restrained

scenes.title: The chapter turns toward morning
scenes.subject_block: first pale dawn light breaking over a hewn tomb, the heavy stone, dew and quiet, hope at the edge of dark
scenes.camera: slow rise with the dawn light

scenes.title: He shall be satisfied (the risen Servant)
scenes.subject_block: a radiant risen figure standing in golden morning light, alive, scars on his hands, serene and satisfied, glory restored

scenes.title: The arm of the LORD is a person
scenes.subject_block: a mighty outstretched arm of light resolving into the pierced hand and face of Christ, the saving strength of God revealed as a person
scenes.camera: slow reveal from arm to face

scenes.title: It has your name (grace reaches out)
scenes.subject_block: Christ reaching a pierced hand toward the viewer in warm light, one ordinary kneeling figure receiving it, intimate and tender
scenes.camera: slow push-in to the offered hand

scenes.title: His name is Jesus (HERO close)
scenes.subject_block: the risen Christ full of light, face lifted, the marred-now-glorified Servant, the gospel-pivot hero image, luminous gold, reverent close
